description: ML model scoring loan applicants on likelihood of default
data_inputs: Credit bureau data; bank transaction history; employment records; age; postcode
notes: Annex III Category 5(b) — AI used in creditworthiness assessment. Outputs directly influence lending decisions affecting natural persons. Explainability tooling (SHAP) partially implemented but not documented to required standard.

description: Real-time transaction anomaly detection flagging potentially fraudulent activity
data_inputs: Transaction metadata; device fingerprint; behavioural patterns; merchant category codes
outputs: Binary flag (fraud/not fraud) + confidence score; triggers manual review or automatic block
notes: Not classified as high-risk under Annex III. Outputs trigger human review before punitive action (account suspension) — human-in-the-loop structure maintained. Vendor contract does not currently include AI Act compliance clauses.

description: NLP-based CV screening and candidate shortlisting tool integrated into recruitment workflow
data_inputs: CV text; LinkedIn profile data (where provided); job description
outputs: Ranked shortlist of candidates; fit score per candidate
notes: Annex III Category 4(a) — AI used in recruitment and selection of natural persons. Currently operating without documented conformity assessment. No bias audit has been performed. This system is a priority remediation item.

description: Conversational AI assistant handling Tier-1 customer support queries via web and mobile
data_inputs: Customer query text; account metadata (with consent); product documentation
outputs: Natural language response; escalation routing to human agent where confidence is low
notes: Transparency obligation applies — customers must be informed they are interacting with an AI. Disclosure banner implemented on web channel; mobile channel disclosure under review. No high-risk classification applies.

description: Recommendation engine surfacing personalised financial product offers
data_inputs: Transaction history; product holdings; demographic segment; browsing behaviour (consented)
outputs: Ranked product recommendations delivered via app and email
notes: No significant risk to rights or safety. GDPR consent and profiling notices in place. Recommendation engine does not make binding decisions — customer retains full choice. Review cycle is adequate given risk level.

description: Document intelligence model extracting structured data from insurance application forms and supporting documents
data_inputs: Scanned PDFs; insurance application forms; supporting identity and income documents
outputs: Structured data extract (JSON); confidence scores per extracted field
notes: Annex III Category 5(b) potentially applicable depending on how underwriting decisions are made. Currently in pilot — no production decisions made yet. Governance review required before production deployment. Risk tier to be confirmed with legal.

description: NLP model monitoring regulatory publications and flagging relevant changes for compliance team
data_inputs: Public regulatory texts; press releases; EBA and ECB publications
outputs: Summary digest; relevance tags; alert notifications to compliance team
notes: Internal-use system with no direct impact on natural persons outside the organisation. Output is informational only — compliance team validates all alerts. Low risk profile.
